docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Numerical Methods in Plasma Physics

Established in 2012, the Division is developing new computational methods for fusion research.

docs.title: Codes
docs.text: GEMPICX Description of GEMPICX. STRUPHY Description of STRUPHY. GVEC Description of GVEC.

docs.title: Publications
docs.text: Publications List of scientific publications. Dissertations List of student dissertation outputs.

docs.title: Working groups
docs.text:
The division comprises six working groups:

  • Kinetic and Gyrokinetic Models
  • Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD)
  • Geometric Numerical Integration and Reduced Complexity Modelling
  • Probabilistic Data Analysis and Active Learning
  • Zonal Flows in Turbulent Plasmas
  • Advanced Computing Hub (ACH)
  • Finite Element Methods (FEM)

docs.title: Codes
docs.text:
This page provides a quick table of contents for NMPP code documentation.

The following codes are developed at NMPP, maybe we should distinguish between codes and libraries?

  • GEMPICX
  • STRUPHY
  • GVEC
  • GeometricIntegrators
